title: Potion API
description: API mod that supports various potions.
body:
# This mod adds various Potions.
## Several potions support new icons and new effects!




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Weight Distribution - Slow to surrounding mobs.

- Step Move - Move quickly even on high walls.

- Revive - When you die, you resurrect, but your buffs remain.

- Gravity resistance - Removes gravity from surrounding mobs.

- Hypnosis - The point of view moves on its own.

- Attack Speed - Attack speed increases.

- Knockback Resistance - Knockback resistance disappears.

- Vampire - When you attack, you recover health with a certain probability.

- Cataclysm Resistance - Remove negative effects of Cataclysm mod.

- Feather Falling - You do not take fall damage.

- Fire - Takes burn damage.

- Lightning Bolt - You will be struck by lightning.

- Adaptation - Most of the negative effects are not affected.

- Rich - The shooting range increases.

- Love - The screen will rotate and recover with a certain probability.

- Fiy - Flying around like in creative mode.

- Snake Apple - Poison attack on surrounding mobs

- bubble - Launches the target into the air, dealing explosive damage over time. Deals 3.5 fixed damage.

- Evil Apple - Instant damage to surrounding mobs.

</details>
